name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
summary: Health insurance cover of up to Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation.
eligibility: Families identified under SECC 2011 deprivation criteria; state-specific extensions in some states.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
summary: Interest subsidy and financial assistance for construction or purchase of a first home.
eligibility: Families with no pucca house in India, income-based EWS/LIG/MIG categories.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
department: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
summary: Free LPG connection to women from BPL households.
eligibility: Adult woman from a BPL household without an existing LPG connection.

name: PM-KISAN
summary: Income support of Rs. 6,000 per year to eligible farmer families, paid in three instalments.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmer families with cultivable landholding, subject to exclusion criteria.

name: BESCOM New Electricity Connection
summary: Apply for a new residential or commercial electricity connection in Bengaluru.
eligibility: Property owner or tenant with valid occupancy proof within BESCOM jurisdiction.

name: BBMP Khata Registration / Transfer
summary: Register or transfer property khata records for tax and legal ownership purposes.

name: New Ration Card Application
department: Department of Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs
summary: Apply for a new ration card to access subsidised food grains through the PDS.
eligibility: Resident household without an existing ration card.
documents: Aadhaar card of all family members

name: Driving Licence (Learner's + Permanent)
summary: Apply for a learner's licence followed by a permanent driving licence via the Sarathi portal.
eligibility: Minimum age 18 for gear vehicles (16 with guardian consent for non-gear under 50cc).

name: Income Certificate
summary: Official proof of annual family income, required for most welfare scheme applications.
eligibility: Any resident; issued by the local Tahsildar or via e-District portal.

name: Caste Certificate
summary: Proof of caste category required for reservations in education, jobs, and welfare schemes.
eligibility: Resident belonging to SC/ST/OBC category as per state list.

name: BWSSB Water Connection
department: Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board
summary: Apply for a new domestic or commercial water and sewerage connection in Bengaluru.
eligibility: Property owner within BWSSB service area.

name: Voter ID Registration
summary: Register as a new voter or update existing voter ID details via the National Voters' Service Portal.
eligibility: Indian citizen aged 18 or above, ordinarily resident at the given address.
